about.p1:
Matteo Michele Bianchini - Engineer and Software Developer graduated from Politecnico di Milano.

A background that combines R&D, software development and mechatronics for a systemic view of projects.
about.p2: With over 15 years of experience, I have collaborated with innovative startups and large enterprise companies, developing solutions that deliver real value to clients.
about.p3: From software development to research and process automation, we offer complete solutions for the most advanced technical needs.

members.quote: Designing software is a craftsman's work that requires experience, patience, vision and care for details.
The efficiency of organizations and projects comes from deep analyses, understanding and intuition.

services.subtitle: Complete engineering solutions: from initial design to production deployment

cards.title: Full-Stack Development
cards.body: Complete web and mobile application development, from frontend to backend infrastructure, using the most modern and performant technologies.

cards.title: IT Consulting
cards.body: Strategic support for your company's technology decisions, from stack selection to architecture definition.

cards.title: Scalable Architectures
cards.body: Design and implementation of distributed systems capable of growing with your business, ensuring performance and reliability.

cards.title: Mechatronics & CAD
cards.body: Mechanical design, industrial automation and prototyping with professional 3D CAD software.

tech.subtitle: Modern and proven technologies to build robust and performant solutions

contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Contact us to discuss how we can help you bring it to life.
